nasb.text: When Jesus saw her, He called her over and said to her, “Woman, you are freed from your sickness.”

esv.text: When Jesus saw her, he called her over and said to her, “Woman, you are freed from your disability.”

cnv.text: 耶穌看見了，就叫她過來，對她說：“婦人，你脫離這疾病了。”

ccb.text: 耶稣看见她，便叫她过来，说：“妇人，你再不会被疾病缠身了！”

csbs.text: 耶稣看见她，就招呼她，对她说：“妇人，你已经从你的疾病中被释放了！”
